sEn: Deep contextualized word representations significantly improve NLP tasks by modeling complex word characteristics and polysemy.
sZh: 深度上下文词表示通过建模单词的复杂特征和多义性，显著提升了自然语言处理任务的表现。
absEn: We introduce a new type of deep contextualized word representation that models both (1) complex characteristics of word use (e.g., syntax and semantics), and (2) how these uses vary across linguistic contexts (i.e., to model polysemy). Our word vectors are learned functions of the internal states of a deep bidirectional language model (biLM), which is pre-trained on a large text corpus. We show that these representations can be easily added to existing models and significantly improve the state of the art across six challenging NLP problems, including question answering, textual entailment and sentiment analysis. We also present an analysis showing that exposing the deep internals of the pre-trained network is crucial, allowing downstream models to mix different types of semi-supervision signals.
absZh: 我们引入了一种新型的深度上下文词表示，它同时建模了（1）单词使用的复杂特征（如句法和语义），以及（2）这些用法在不同语言上下文中的变化（即建模多义性）。我们的词向量是从一个在大规模文本语料上预训练的深度双向语言模型（biLM）的内部状态学习得到的函数。我们展示了这些表示可以轻松添加到现有模型中，并在六个具有挑战性的自然语言处理问题（包括问答、文本蕴含和情感分析）上显著提升了当前最优结果。我们还进行了分析，表明暴露预训练网络的深层内部结构至关重要，这使得下游模型能够混合不同类型的半监督信号。

contrib.en: Introduces ELMo, deep contextualized word representations from a bidirectional language model.
contrib.zh: 提出ELMo，一种基于双向语言模型的深度上下文词表示。

contrib.en: Shows ELMo improves state-of-the-art on six NLP tasks: QA, textual entailment, SRL, coreference, NER, sentiment.
contrib.zh: 展示ELMo在六个NLP任务（问答、文本蕴含、语义角色标注、共指消解、命名实体识别、情感分析）上提升最先进水平。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that using all biLM layers outperforms using only the top layer.
contrib.zh: 证明使用所有biLM层优于仅使用顶层。

contrib.en: Reveals lower biLM layers encode syntax, higher layers encode semantics.
contrib.zh: 揭示biLM低层编码句法，高层编码语义。

contrib.en: Shows ELMo increases sample efficiency, requiring less data and fewer updates.
contrib.zh: 展示ELMo提高样本效率，需要更少数据和更少更新。

limits.en: ELMo requires a pre-trained biLM, which is computationally expensive to train.
limits.zh: ELMo需要预训练的biLM，训练计算成本高。

limits.en: ELMo representations are fixed after pre-training; no fine-tuning of biLM for downstream tasks.
limits.zh: ELMo表示在预训练后固定，不对下游任务微调biLM。

limits.en: ELMo only tested on English; performance on other languages is unknown.
limits.zh: ELMo仅在英语上测试，其他语言性能未知。

limits.en: ELMo adds computational overhead at inference time due to biLM forward pass.
limits.zh: ELMo在推理时因biLM前向传播增加计算开销。

items.en: We introduce a new type of deep contextualized word representation that models both (1) complex characteristics of word use (e.g., syntax and semantics), and (2) how these uses vary across linguistic contexts (i.e., to model polysemy). Our word vectors are learned functions of the internal states of a deep bidirectional language model (biLM), which is pre-trained on a large text corpus. We show that these representations can be easily added to existing models and significantly improve the state of the art across six challenging NLP problems, including question answering, textual entailment and sentiment analysis. We also present an analysis showing that exposing the deep internals of the pre-trained network is crucial, allowing downstream models to mix different types of semi-supervision signals.
items.zh: 我们引入了一种新型深度上下文词表示，它同时建模了（1）词汇使用的复杂特征（如句法和语义），以及（2）这些用法在不同语言上下文中的变化（即建模多义性）。我们的词向量是深度双向语言模型（biLM）内部状态的学习函数，该模型在大规模文本语料库上进行了预训练。我们展示了这些表示可以轻松添加到现有模型中，并在六个具有挑战性的自然语言处理问题（包括问答、文本蕴含和情感分析）上显著提升了当前最佳性能。我们还进行了分析，表明暴露预训练网络的深层内部结构至关重要，这使得下游模型能够混合不同类型的半监督信号。

items.en: Pre-trained word representations (Mikolov et al., 2013; Pennington et al., 2014) are a key component in many neural language understanding models. However, learning high quality representations can be challenging. They should ideally model both (1) complex characteristics of word use (e.g., syntax and semantics), and (2) how these uses vary across linguistic contexts (i.e., to model polysemy). In this paper, we introduce a new type of deep contextualized word representation that directly addresses both challenges, can be easily integrated into existing models, and significantly improves the state of the art in every considered case across a range of challenging language understanding problems.
items.zh: 预训练词表示（Mikolov 等人，2013；Pennington 等人，2014）是许多神经语言理解模型的关键组成部分。然而，学习高质量表示可能具有挑战性。理想情况下，它们应同时建模（1）词汇使用的复杂特征（如句法和语义），以及（2）这些用法在不同语言上下文中的变化（即建模多义性）。在本文中，我们引入了一种新型深度上下文词表示，直接解决了这两个挑战，可以轻松集成到现有模型中，并在一系列具有挑战性的语言理解问题中显著提升了每个考虑案例的当前最佳性能。

items.en: Our representations differ from traditional word type embeddings in that each token is assigned a representation that is a function of the entire input sentence. We use vectors derived from a bidirectional LSTM that is trained with a coupled language model (LM) objective on a large text corpus. For this reason, we call them ELMo (Embeddings from Language Models) representations. Unlike previous approaches for learning contextualized word vectors (Peters et al., 2017; McCann et al., 2017), ELMo representations are deep, in the sense that they are a function of all of the internal layers of the biLM. More specifically, we learn a linear combination of the vectors stacked above each input word for each end task, which markedly improves performance over just using the top LSTM layer.
items.zh: 我们的表示与传统词类型嵌入不同，每个词元被分配一个表示，该表示是整个输入句子的函数。我们使用从双向LSTM导出的向量，该LSTM在大规模文本语料库上使用耦合语言模型目标进行训练。因此，我们称它们为ELMo（来自语言模型的嵌入）表示。与之前学习上下文词向量的方法（Peters 等人，2017；McCann 等人，2017）不同，ELMo表示是深层的，因为它们是biLM所有内部层的函数。更具体地说，对于每个最终任务，我们学习每个输入词上方堆叠向量的线性组合，这显著优于仅使用顶层LSTM层的性能。

items.en: Combining the internal states in this manner allows for very rich word representations. Using intrinsic evaluations, we show that the higher-level LSTM states capture context-dependent aspects of word meaning (e.g., they can be used without modification to perform well on supervised word sense disambiguation tasks) while lower-level states model aspects of syntax (e.g., they can be used to do part-of-speech tagging). Simultaneously exposing all of these signals is highly beneficial, allowing the learned models select the types of semi-supervision that are most useful for each end task.
items.zh: 以这种方式组合内部状态允许非常丰富的词表示。通过内在评估，我们表明较高层的LSTM状态捕捉了词义的上下文相关方面（例如，它们可以直接用于在监督词义消歧任务上表现良好），而较低层状态建模了句法方面（例如，它们可用于进行词性标注）。同时暴露所有这些信号非常有益，允许学习模型选择对每个最终任务最有用的半监督类型。

items.en: Extensive experiments demonstrate that ELMo representations work extremely well in practice. We first show that they can be easily added to existing models for six diverse and challenging language understanding problems, including textual entailment, question answering and sentiment analysis. The addition of ELMo representations alone significantly improves the state of the art in every case, including up to 20% relative error reductions. For tasks where direct comparisons are possible, ELMo outperforms CoVe (McCann et al., 2017), which computes contextualized representations using a neural machine translation encoder. Finally, an analysis of both ELMo and CoVe reveals that deep representations outperform those derived from just the top layer of an LSTM. Our trained models and code are publicly available, and we expect that ELMo will provide similar gains for many other NLP problems.111http://allennlp.org/elmo
items.zh: 大量实验表明，ELMo表示在实践中效果极好。我们首先展示了它们可以轻松添加到六个多样且具有挑战性的语言理解问题的现有模型中，包括文本蕴含、问答和情感分析。仅添加ELMo表示就在每个案例中显著提升了当前最佳性能，包括高达20%的相对错误减少。对于可以直接比较的任务，ELMo优于CoVe（McCann 等人，2017），后者使用神经机器翻译编码器计算上下文表示。最后，对ELMo和CoVe的分析表明，深层表示优于仅从LSTM顶层导出的表示。我们的训练模型和代码已公开，我们期望ELMo将为许多其他NLP问题提供类似的改进。

items.en: Due to their ability to capture syntactic and semantic information of words from large scale unlabeled text, pretrained word vectors (Turian et al., 2010; Mikolov et al., 2013; Pennington et al., 2014) are a standard component of most state-of-the-art NLP architectures, including for question answering (Liu et al., 2017), textual entailment (Chen et al., 2017) and semantic role labeling (He et al., 2017). However, these approaches for learning word vectors only allow a single context-independent representation for each word.
items.zh: 由于能够从大规模未标记文本中捕捉词汇的句法和语义信息，预训练词向量（Turian 等人，2010；Mikolov 等人，2013；Pennington 等人，2014）是大多数当前最佳NLP架构的标准组件，包括问答（Liu 等人，2017）、文本蕴含（Chen 等人，2017）和语义角色标注（He 等人，2017）。然而，这些学习词向量的方法只允许每个词有一个独立的上下文无关表示。

items.en: Previously proposed methods overcome some of the shortcomings of traditional word vectors by either enriching them with subword information (e.g., Wieting et al., 2016; Bojanowski et al., 2017) or learning separate vectors for each word sense (e.g., Neelakantan et al., 2014). Our approach also benefits from subword units through the use of character convolutions, and we seamlessly incorporate multi-sense information into downstream tasks without explicitly training to predict predefined sense classes.
items.zh: 先前提出的方法通过用子词信息丰富它们（例如，Wieting 等人，2016；Bojanowski 等人，2017）或为每个词义学习单独的向量（例如，Neelakantan 等人，2014）来克服传统词向量的一些缺点。我们的方法也通过使用字符卷积受益于子词单元，并且我们无缝地将多义信息融入下游任务，而无需显式训练以预测预定义的义类。

items.en: Other recent work has also focused on learning context-dependent representations. context2vec (Melamud et al., 2016) uses a bidirectional Long Short Term Memory (LSTM; Hochreiter and Schmidhuber, 1997) to encode the context around a pivot word. Other approaches for learning contextual embeddings include the pivot word itself in the representation and are computed with the encoder of either a supervised neural machine translation (MT) system (CoVe; McCann et al., 2017) or an unsupervised language model (Peters et al., 2017). Both of these approaches benefit from large datasets, although the MT approach is limited by the size of parallel corpora. In this paper, we take full advantage of access to plentiful monolingual data, and train our biLM on a corpus with approximately 30 million sentences (Chelba et al., 2014). We also generalize these approaches to deep contextual representations, which we show work well across a broad range of diverse NLP tasks.
items.zh: 其他近期工作也专注于学习上下文相关表示。context2vec（Melamud 等人，2016）使用双向长短期记忆网络（LSTM；Hochreiter 和 Schmidhuber，1997）编码枢轴词周围的上下文。其他学习上下文嵌入的方法包括将枢轴词本身纳入表示，并使用监督神经机器翻译（MT）系统（CoVe；McCann 等人，2017）或无监督语言模型（Peters 等人，2017）的编码器计算。这两种方法都受益于大型数据集，尽管MT方法受限于平行语料库的大小。在本文中，我们充分利用丰富的单语数据，并在约3000万句子的语料库上训练我们的biLM（Chelba 等人，2014）。我们还将这些方法推广到深度上下文表示，并展示了它们在广泛多样的NLP任务上表现良好。

items.en: Previous work has also shown that different layers of deep biRNNs encode different types of information. For example, introducing multi-task syntactic supervision (e.g., part-of-speech tags) at the lower levels of a deep LSTM can improve overall performance of higher level tasks such as dependency parsing (Hashimoto et al., 2017) or CCG super tagging (Søgaard and Goldberg, 2016). In an RNN-based encoder-decoder machine translation system, Belinkov et al. (2017) showed that the representations learned at the first layer in a 2-layer LSTM encoder are better at predicting POS tags then second layer. Finally, the top layer of an LSTM for encoding word context (Melamud et al., 2016) has been shown to learn representations of word sense. We show that similar signals are also induced by the modified language model objective of our ELMo representations, and it can be very beneficial to learn models for downstream tasks that mix these different types of semi-supervision.
items.zh: 先前的工作也表明，深度双向RNN的不同层编码不同类型的信息。例如，在深度LSTM的较低层引入多任务句法监督（如词性标签）可以提高较高层任务（如依存句法分析（Hashimoto 等人，2017）或CCG超级标注（Søgaard 和 Goldberg，2016））的整体性能。在基于RNN的编码器-解码器机器翻译系统中，Belinkov 等人（2017）表明，在2层LSTM编码器的第一层学习的表示比第二层更擅长预测词性标签。最后，用于编码词上下文的LSTM顶层（Melamud 等人，2016）已被证明能学习词义表示。我们表明，类似的信号也由ELMo表示的修改语言模型目标诱导，并且学习混合这些不同类型半监督的下游任务模型可能非常有益。

items.en: Dai and Le (2015) and Ramachandran et al. (2017) pretrain encoder-decoder pairs using language models and sequence autoencoders and then fine tune with task specific supervision. In contrast, after pretraining the biLM with unlabeled data, we fix the weights and add additional task-specific model capacity, allowing us to leverage large, rich and universal biLM representations for cases where downstream training data size dictates a smaller supervised model.
items.zh: Dai 和 Le（2015）以及 Ramachandran 等人（2017）使用语言模型和序列自编码器预训练编码器-解码器对，然后使用任务特定监督进行微调。相比之下，在使用未标记数据预训练biLM后，我们固定权重并添加额外的任务特定模型容量，使我们能够在下游训练数据大小决定较小监督模型的情况下，利用大型、丰富且通用的biLM表示。

items.en: Unlike most widely used word embeddings (Pennington et al., 2014), ELMo word representations are functions of the entire input sentence, as described in this section. They are computed on top of two-layer biLMs with character convolutions (Sec. 3.1), as a linear function of the internal network states (Sec. 3.2). This setup allows us to do semi-supervised learning, where the biLM is pretrained at a large scale (Sec. 3.4) and easily incorporated into a wide range of existing neural NLP architectures (Sec. 3.3).
items.zh: 与大多数广泛使用的词嵌入（Pennington 等人，2014）不同，ELMo词表示是整个输入句子的函数，如本节所述。它们是在两层biLM之上计算的，使用字符卷积（第3.1节），作为内部网络状态的线性函数（第3.2节）。这种设置允许我们进行半监督学习，其中biLM在大规模上进行预训练（第3.4节），并轻松集成到各种现有的神经NLP架构中（第3.3节）。

items.en: Given a sequence of N𝑁N tokens, (t1,t2,…,tN)subscript𝑡1subscript𝑡2…subscript𝑡𝑁(t_{1},t_{2},...,t_{N}), a forward language model computes the probability of the sequence by modeling the probability of token tksubscript𝑡𝑘t_{k} given the history (t1,…,tk−1)subscript𝑡1…subscript𝑡𝑘1(t_{1},...,t_{k-1}):
items.zh: 给定一个由N个词元组成的序列(t1, t2, ..., tN)，前向语言模型通过建模在历史(t1, ..., tk-1)条件下词元tk的概率来计算序列的概率：

items.en: Recent state-of-the-art neural language models (Józefowicz et al., 2016; Melis et al., 2017; Merity et al., 2017) compute a context-independent token representation 𝐱kL​Msubscriptsuperscript𝐱𝐿𝑀𝑘\mathbf{x}^{LM}_{k} (via token embeddings or a CNN over characters) then pass it through L𝐿L layers of forward LSTMs. At each position k𝑘k, each LSTM layer outputs a context-dependent representation 𝐡→k,jL​Msubscriptsuperscript→𝐡𝐿𝑀𝑘𝑗\overrightarrow{\mathbf{h}}^{LM}_{k,j} where j=1,…,L𝑗1…𝐿j=1,\ldots,L. The top layer LSTM output, 𝐡→k,LL​Msubscriptsuperscript→𝐡𝐿𝑀𝑘𝐿\overrightarrow{\mathbf{h}}^{LM}_{k,L}, is used to predict the next token tk+1subscript𝑡𝑘1t_{k+1} with a Softmax layer.
items.zh: 最近的当前最佳神经语言模型（Józefowicz 等人，2016；Melis 等人，2017；Merity 等人，2017）计算一个上下文无关的词元表示x_k^LM（通过词元嵌入或字符上的CNN），然后将其通过L层前向LSTM。在每个位置k，每个LSTM层输出一个上下文相关表示h→_{k,j}^{LM}，其中j=1,...,L。顶层LSTM输出h→_{k,L}^{LM}用于通过Softmax层预测下一个词元t_{k+1}。

items.en: A backward LM is similar to a forward LM, except it runs over the sequence in reverse, predicting the previous token given the future context:
items.zh: 后向LM与前向LM类似，只是它反向运行序列，根据未来上下文预测前一个词元：

items.en: It can be implemented in an analogous way to a forward LM, with each backward LSTM layer j𝑗j in a L𝐿L layer deep model producing representations 𝐡←k,jL​Msubscriptsuperscript←𝐡𝐿𝑀𝑘𝑗\overleftarrow{\mathbf{h}}^{LM}_{k,j} of tksubscript𝑡𝑘t_{k} given (tk+1,…,tN)subscript𝑡𝑘1…subscript𝑡𝑁(t_{k+1},\ldots,t_{N}).
items.zh: 它可以以与前向LM类似的方式实现，在L层深度模型中，每个后向LSTM层j产生表示h←_{k,j}^{LM}，表示在给定(t_{k+1}, ..., t_N)条件下t_k的表示。

items.en: A biLM combines both a forward and backward LM. Our formulation jointly maximizes the log likelihood of the forward and backward directions:
items.zh: biLM结合了前向和后向LM。我们的公式联合最大化前向和后向方向的对数似然：

items.en: We tie the parameters for both the token representation (ΘxsubscriptΘ𝑥\Theta_{x}) and Softmax layer (ΘssubscriptΘ𝑠\Theta_{s}) in the forward and backward direction while maintaining separate parameters for the LSTMs in each direction. Overall, this formulation is similar to the approach of Peters et al. (2017), with the exception that we share some weights between directions instead of using completely independent parameters. In the next section, we depart from previous work by introducing a new approach for learning word representations that are a linear combination of the biLM layers.
items.zh: 我们在前向和后向方向上绑定词元表示（Θ_x）和Softmax层（Θ_s）的参数，同时为每个方向的LSTM保留单独的参数。总体而言，该公式与Peters等人（2017）的方法类似，不同之处在于我们在方向之间共享一些权重，而不是使用完全独立的参数。在下一节中，我们偏离先前的工作，引入一种新的学习词表示的方法，该表示是biLM层的线性组合。

items.en: ELMo is a task specific combination of the intermediate layer representations in the biLM. For each token tksubscript𝑡𝑘t_{k}, a L𝐿L-layer biLM computes a set of 2​L+12𝐿12L+1 representations
items.zh: ELMo是biLM中间层表示的任务特定组合。对于每个词元t_k，一个L层biLM计算一组2L+1个表示

items.en: where 𝐡k,0L​Msubscriptsuperscript𝐡𝐿𝑀𝑘0\mathbf{h}^{LM}_{k,0} is the token layer and 𝐡k,jL​M=[𝐡→k,jL​M;𝐡←k,jL​M]subscriptsuperscript𝐡𝐿𝑀𝑘𝑗subscriptsuperscript→𝐡𝐿𝑀𝑘𝑗subscriptsuperscript←𝐡𝐿𝑀𝑘𝑗\mathbf{h}^{LM}_{k,j}=[\overrightarrow{\mathbf{h}}^{LM}_{k,j};\overleftarrow{\mathbf{h}}^{LM}_{k,j}], for each biLSTM layer.
items.zh: 其中h_{k,0}^{LM}是词元层，h_{k,j}^{LM}=[h→_{k,j}^{LM}; h←_{k,j}^{LM}]，对于每个biLSTM层。

items.en: For inclusion in a downstream model, ELMo collapses all layers in R𝑅R into a single vector, 𝐄𝐋𝐌𝐨k=E​(Rk;𝚯e)subscript𝐄𝐋𝐌𝐨𝑘𝐸subscript𝑅𝑘subscript𝚯𝑒\mathbf{ELMo}_{k}=E(R_{k};\mathbf{\Theta}_{e}). In the simplest case, ELMo just selects the top layer, E​(Rk)=𝐡k,LL​M𝐸subscript𝑅𝑘subscriptsuperscript𝐡𝐿𝑀𝑘𝐿E(R_{k})=\mathbf{h}^{LM}_{k,L}, as in TagLM (Peters et al., 2017) and CoVe (McCann et al., 2017). More generally, we compute a task specific weighting of all biLM layers:
items.zh: 为了包含在下游模型中，ELMo将R中的所有层压缩成一个向量ELMo_k = E(R_k; Θ_e)。在最简单的情况下，ELMo仅选择顶层E(R_k)=h_{k,L}^{LM}，如TagLM（Peters等人，2017）和CoVe（McCann等人，2017）。更一般地，我们计算所有biLM层的任务特定加权：

items.en: In (1), 𝐬t​a​s​ksuperscript𝐬𝑡𝑎𝑠𝑘\mathbf{s}^{task} are softmax-normalized weights and the scalar parameter γt​a​s​ksuperscript𝛾𝑡𝑎𝑠𝑘\gamma^{task} allows the task model to scale the entire ELMo vector. γ𝛾\gamma is of practical importance to aid the optimization process (see supplemental material for details). Considering that the activations of each biLM layer have a different distribution, in some cases it also helped to apply layer normalization (Ba et al., 2016) to each biLM layer before weighting.
items.zh: 在(1)中，𝐬task是经过softmax归一化的权重，标量参数γtask允许任务模型缩放整个ELMo向量。γ对于辅助优化过程具有实际重要性（详见补充材料）。考虑到每个biLM层的激活分布不同，在某些情况下，在加权之前对每个biLM层应用层归一化（Ba等人，2016）也有帮助。

full.sec: 3.3 Using biLMs for supervised NLP tasks
full.secZh: 3.3 使用双向语言模型进行监督NLP任务

items.en: Given a pre-trained biLM and a supervised architecture for a target NLP task, it is a simple process to use the biLM to improve the task model. We simply run the biLM and record all of the layer representations for each word. Then, we let the end task model learn a linear combination of these representations, as described below.
items.zh: 给定预训练的biLM和目标NLP任务的监督架构，使用biLM改进任务模型是一个简单的过程。我们只需运行biLM并记录每个单词的所有层表示。然后，让最终任务模型学习这些表示的线性组合，如下所述。

items.en: First consider the lowest layers of the supervised model without the biLM. Most supervised NLP models share a common architecture at the lowest layers, allowing us to add ELMo in a consistent, unified manner. Given a sequence of tokens (t1,…,tN)subscript𝑡1…subscript𝑡𝑁(t_{1},\ldots,t_{N}), it is standard to form a context-independent token representation 𝐱ksubscript𝐱𝑘\mathbf{x}_{k} for each token position using pre-trained word embeddings and optionally character-based representations. Then, the model forms a context-sensitive representation 𝐡ksubscript𝐡𝑘\mathbf{h}_{k}, typically using either bidirectional RNNs, CNNs, or feed forward networks.
items.zh: 首先考虑没有biLM的监督模型的最低层。大多数监督NLP模型在最低层共享一个通用架构，这使我们能够以一致、统一的方式添加ELMo。给定一个词元序列(t1,…,tN)，标准做法是使用预训练的词嵌入和可选的基于字符的表示为每个词元位置形成一个上下文无关的词元表示𝐱k。然后，模型形成一个上下文相关的表示𝐱k，通常使用双向RNN、CNN或前馈网络。

items.en: To add ELMo to the supervised model, we first freeze the weights of the biLM and then concatenate the ELMo vector 𝐄𝐋𝐌𝐨kt​a​s​ksubscriptsuperscript𝐄𝐋𝐌𝐨𝑡𝑎𝑠𝑘𝑘\mathbf{ELMo}^{task}_{k} with 𝐱ksubscript𝐱𝑘\mathbf{x}_{k} and pass the ELMo enhanced representation [𝐱k;𝐄𝐋𝐌𝐨kt​a​s​k]subscript𝐱𝑘subscriptsuperscript𝐄𝐋𝐌𝐨𝑡𝑎𝑠𝑘𝑘[\mathbf{x}_{k};\mathbf{ELMo}^{task}_{k}] into the task RNN. For some tasks (e.g., SNLI, SQuAD), we observe further improvements by also including ELMo at the output of the task RNN by introducing another set of output specific linear weights and replacing 𝐡ksubscript𝐡𝑘\mathbf{h}_{k} with [𝐡k;𝐄𝐋𝐌𝐨kt​a​s​k]subscript𝐡𝑘subscriptsuperscript𝐄𝐋𝐌𝐨𝑡𝑎𝑠𝑘𝑘[\mathbf{h}_{k};\mathbf{ELMo}^{task}_{k}]. As the remainder of the supervised model remains unchanged, these additions can happen within the context of more complex neural models. For example, see the SNLI experiments in Sec. 4 where a bi-attention layer follows the biLSTMs, or the coreference resolution experiments where a clustering model is layered on top of the biLSTMs.
items.zh: 为了将ELMo添加到监督模型中，我们首先冻结biLM的权重，然后将ELMo向量𝐄𝐋𝐌𝐨ktask与𝐱k拼接，并将增强后的表示[𝐱k;𝐄𝐋𝐌𝐨ktask]传入任务RNN。对于某些任务（例如SNLI、SQuAD），我们观察到通过在任务RNN的输出端也引入ELMo（通过引入另一组输出特定的线性权重，并将𝐡k替换为[𝐡k;𝐄𝐋𝐌𝐨ktask]）可以进一步改进。由于监督模型的其余部分保持不变，这些添加可以在更复杂的神经模型中进行。例如，参见第4节中的SNLI实验（其中biLSTM之后是双向注意力层），或共指消解实验（其中聚类模型位于biLSTM之上）。

items.en: Finally, we found it beneficial to add a moderate amount of dropout to ELMo (Srivastava et al., 2014) and in some cases to regularize the ELMo weights by adding λ​∥𝐰∥22𝜆superscriptsubscriptdelimited-∥∥𝐰22\lambda\lVert\mathbf{w}\rVert_{2}^{2} to the loss. This imposes an inductive bias on the ELMo weights to stay close to an average of all biLM layers.
items.zh: 最后，我们发现对ELMo添加适量的dropout（Srivastava等人，2014）是有益的，并且在某些情况下，通过向损失中添加λ∥𝐰∥22来正则化ELMo权重。这为ELMo权重施加了归纳偏置，使其接近所有biLM层的平均值。

full.secZh: 3.4 预训练双向语言模型架构

items.en: The pre-trained biLMs in this paper are similar to the architectures in Józefowicz et al. (2016) and Kim et al. (2015), but modified to support joint training of both directions and add a residual connection between LSTM layers. We focus on large scale biLMs in this work, as Peters et al. (2017) highlighted the importance of using biLMs over forward-only LMs and large scale training.
items.zh: 本文中的预训练biLM类似于Józefowicz等人（2016）和Kim等人（2015）中的架构，但进行了修改以支持两个方向的联合训练，并在LSTM层之间添加了残差连接。我们在这项工作中专注于大规模biLM，因为Peters等人（2017）强调了使用biLM相对于仅前向LM和大规模训练的重要性。

items.en: To balance overall language model perplexity with model size and computational requirements for downstream tasks while maintaining a purely character-based input representation, we halved all embedding and hidden dimensions from the single best model CNN-BIG-LSTM in Józefowicz et al. (2016). The final model uses L=2𝐿2L=2 biLSTM layers with 4096 units and 512 dimension projections and a residual connection from the first to second layer. The context insensitive type representation uses 2048 character n-gram convolutional filters followed by two highway layers (Srivastava et al., 2015) and a linear projection down to a 512 representation. As a result, the biLM provides three layers of representations for each input token, including those outside the training set due to the purely character input. In contrast, traditional word embedding methods only provide one layer of representation for tokens in a fixed vocabulary.
items.zh: 为了在保持纯字符输入表示的同时，平衡整体语言模型困惑度与模型大小及下游任务的计算需求，我们将Józefowicz等人（2016）中最佳单模型CNN-BIG-LSTM的所有嵌入和隐藏维度减半。最终模型使用L=2个biLSTM层，每层4096个单元和512维投影，并在第一层和第二层之间添加残差连接。上下文无关的类型表示使用2048个字符n-gram卷积滤波器，随后是两个高速层（Srivastava等人，2015）和一个线性投影降至512维表示。因此，biLM为每个输入词元提供三层表示，包括由于纯字符输入而超出训练集的词元。相比之下，传统的词嵌入方法仅为固定词汇表中的词元提供一层表示。

items.en: After training for 10 epochs on the 1B Word Benchmark (Chelba et al., 2014), the average forward and backward perplexities is 39.7, compared to 30.0 for the forward CNN-BIG-LSTM. Generally, we found the forward and backward perplexities to be approximately equal, with the backward value slightly lower.
items.zh: 在1B词基准（Chelba等人，2014）上训练10个epoch后，平均前向和后向困惑度为39.7，而前向CNN-BIG-LSTM为30.0。通常，我们发现前向和后向困惑度大致相等，后向值略低。

items.en: Once pretrained, the biLM can compute representations for any task. In some cases, fine tuning the biLM on domain specific data leads to significant drops in perplexity and an increase in downstream task performance. This can be seen as a type of domain transfer for the biLM. As a result, in most cases we used a fine-tuned biLM in the downstream task. See supplemental material for details.
items.zh: 一旦预训练完成，biLM可以为任何任务计算表示。在某些情况下，在领域特定数据上微调biLM会导致困惑度显著下降，并提高下游任务性能。这可以视为biLM的一种领域迁移。因此，在大多数情况下，我们在下游任务中使用微调后的biLM。详见补充材料。

items.en: Question answering The Stanford Question Answering Dataset (SQuAD) (Rajpurkar et al., 2016) contains 100K+ crowd sourced question-answer pairs where the answer is a span in a given Wikipedia paragraph. Our baseline model (Clark and Gardner, 2017) is an improved version of the Bidirectional Attention Flow model in Seo et al. (BiDAF; 2017). It adds a self-attention layer after the bidirectional attention component, simplifies some of the pooling operations and substitutes the LSTMs for gated recurrent units (GRUs; Cho et al., 2014). After adding ELMo to the baseline model, test set F1 improved by 4.7% from 81.1% to 85.8%, a 24.9% relative error reduction over the baseline, and improving the overall single model state-of-the-art by 1.4%. A 11 member ensemble pushes F1 to 87.4, the overall state-of-the-art at time of submission to the leaderboard.222As of November 17, 2017. The increase of 4.7% with ELMo is also significantly larger then the 1.8% improvement from adding CoVe to a baseline model (McCann et al., 2017).
items.zh: 问答 斯坦福问答数据集（SQuAD）（Rajpurkar等人，2016）包含10万多个众包问答对，其中答案位于给定的维基百科段落中。我们的基线模型（Clark和Gardner，2017）是Seo等人（BiDAF；2017）中双向注意力流模型的改进版本。它在双向注意力组件之后添加了一个自注意力层，简化了一些池化操作，并将LSTM替换为门控循环单元（GRU；Cho等人，2014）。在基线模型上添加ELMo后，测试集F1从81.1%提高到85.8%，提升了4.7%，相对基线错误率降低了24.9%，并将整体单模型最先进水平提高了1.4%。一个11成员的集成将F1推至87.4，这是提交排行榜时的整体最先进水平。222截至2017年11月17日。使用ELMo的4.7%提升也显著大于将CoVe添加到基线模型时的1.8%提升（McCann等人，2017）。

items.en: Textual entailment Textual entailment is the task of determining whether a “hypothesis” is true, given a “premise”. The Stanford Natural Language Inference (SNLI) corpus (Bowman et al., 2015) provides approximately 550K hypothesis/premise pairs. Our baseline, the ESIM sequence model from Chen et al. (2017), uses a biLSTM to encode the premise and hypothesis, followed by a matrix attention layer, a local inference layer, another biLSTM inference composition layer, and finally a pooling operation before the output layer. Overall, adding ELMo to the ESIM model improves accuracy by an average of 0.7% across five random seeds. A five member ensemble pushes the overall accuracy to 89.3%, exceeding the previous ensemble best of 88.9% (Gong et al., 2018).
items.zh: 文本蕴含 文本蕴含是判断给定“前提”下“假设”是否为真的任务。斯坦福自然语言推理（SNLI）语料库（Bowman等人，2015）提供了约55万个假设/前提对。我们的基线模型来自Chen等人（2017）的ESIM序列模型，它使用biLSTM编码前提和假设，随后是矩阵注意力层、局部推理层、另一个biLSTM推理组合层，最后在输出层之前进行池化操作。总体而言，将ELMo添加到ESIM模型后，五个随机种子的平均准确率提高了0.7%。一个五成员集成将整体准确率推至89.3%，超过了之前88.9%的集成最佳结果（Gong等人，2018）。

items.en: Semantic role labeling A semantic role labeling (SRL) system models the predicate-argument structure of a sentence, and is often described as answering “Who did what to whom”. He et al. (2017) modeled SRL as a BIO tagging problem and used an 8-layer deep biLSTM with forward and backward directions interleaved, following Zhou and Xu (2015). As shown in Table 1, when adding ELMo to a re-implementation of He et al. (2017) the single model test set F1 jumped 3.2% from 81.4% to 84.6% – a new state-of-the-art on the OntoNotes benchmark (Pradhan et al., 2013), even improving over the previous best ensemble result by 1.2%.
items.zh: 语义角色标注 语义角色标注（SRL）系统对句子的谓词-论元结构进行建模，通常被描述为回答“谁对谁做了什么”。He等人（2017）将SRL建模为BIO标注问题，并使用了一个8层深度biLSTM，前向和后向方向交错排列，遵循Zhou和Xu（2015）。如表1所示，当将ELMo添加到He等人（2017）的重新实现中时，单模型测试集F1从81.4%跃升至84.6%，提升了3.2%——在OntoNotes基准（Pradhan等人，2013）上创造了新的最先进水平，甚至比之前的最佳集成结果提高了1.2%。

items.en: Coreference resolution Coreference resolution is the task of clustering mentions in text that refer to the same underlying real world entities. Our baseline model is the end-to-end span-based neural model of Lee et al. (2017). It uses a biLSTM and attention mechanism to first compute span representations and then applies a softmax mention ranking model to find coreference chains. In our experiments with the OntoNotes coreference annotations from the CoNLL 2012 shared task (Pradhan et al., 2012), adding ELMo improved the average F1 by 3.2% from 67.2 to 70.4, establishing a new state of the art, again improving over the previous best ensemble result by 1.6% F1.
items.zh: 共指消解 共指消解是将文本中指向同一现实世界实体的提及进行聚类的任务。我们的基线模型是Lee等人（2017）的端到端基于跨度的神经模型。它使用biLSTM和注意力机制首先计算跨度表示，然后应用softmax提及排序模型来寻找共指链。在我们使用CoNLL 2012共享任务（Pradhan等人，2012）的OntoNotes共指标注进行的实验中，添加ELMo将平均F1从67.2提高到70.4，提升了3.2%，建立了新的最先进水平，再次比之前的最佳集成结果提高了1.6%的F1。

items.en: Named entity extraction The CoNLL 2003 NER task (Sang and Meulder, 2003) consists of newswire from the Reuters RCV1 corpus tagged with four different entity types (PER, LOC, ORG, MISC). Following recent state-of-the-art systems (Lample et al., 2016; Peters et al., 2017), the baseline model uses pre-trained word embeddings, a character-based CNN representation, two biLSTM layers and a conditional random field (CRF) loss (Lafferty et al., 2001), similar to Collobert et al. (2011). As shown in Table 1, our ELMo enhanced biLSTM-CRF achieves 92.22% F1 averaged over five runs. The key difference between our system and the previous state of the art from Peters et al. (2017) is that we allowed the task model to learn a weighted average of all biLM layers, whereas Peters et al. (2017) only use the top biLM layer. As shown in Sec. 5.1, using all layers instead of just the last layer improves performance across multiple tasks.
items.zh: 命名实体识别 CoNLL 2003 NER任务（Sang和Meulder，2003）包含来自Reuters RCV1语料库的新闻专线，标注了四种实体类型（PER、LOC、ORG、MISC）。遵循最近的最先进系统（Lample等人，2016；Peters等人，2017），基线模型使用预训练的词嵌入、基于字符的CNN表示、两个biLSTM层和条件随机场（CRF）损失（Lafferty等人，2001），类似于Collobert等人（2011）。如表1所示，我们使用ELMo增强的biLSTM-CRF在五次运行中平均达到92.22%的F1。我们的系统与Peters等人（2017）之前最先进水平的关键区别在于，我们允许任务模型学习所有biLM层的加权平均，而Peters等人（2017）仅使用顶层biLM层。如第5.1节所示，使用所有层而不是仅最后一层可以提高多个任务的性能。

items.en: Sentiment analysis The fine-grained sentiment classification task in the Stanford Sentiment Treebank (SST-5; Socher et al., 2013) involves selecting one of five labels (from very negative to very positive) to describe a sentence from a movie review. The sentences contain diverse linguistic phenomena such as idioms and complex syntactic constructions such as negations that are difficult for models to learn. Our baseline model is the biattentive classification network (BCN) from McCann et al. (2017), which also held the prior state-of-the-art result when augmented with CoVe embeddings. Replacing CoVe with ELMo in the BCN model results in a 1.0% absolute accuracy improvement over the state of the art.
items.zh: 情感分析 斯坦福情感树库（SST-5；Socher等人，2013）中的细粒度情感分类任务涉及从五个标签（从非常负面到非常正面）中选择一个来描述电影评论中的句子。这些句子包含多样的语言现象，如习语和复杂的句法结构（如否定），模型难以学习。我们的基线模型是McCann等人（2017）的双向注意力分类网络（BCN），该模型在使用CoVe嵌入增强时也保持了先前的最先进结果。在BCN模型中将CoVe替换为ELMo，使得准确率比最先进水平绝对提高了1.0%。

items.en: This section provides an ablation analysis to validate our chief claims and to elucidate some interesting aspects of ELMo representations. Sec. 5.1 shows that using deep contextual representations in downstream tasks improves performance over previous work that uses just the top layer, regardless of whether they are produced from a biLM or MT encoder, and that ELMo representations provide the best overall performance. Sec. 5.3 explores the different types of contextual information captured in biLMs and uses two intrinsic evaluations to show that syntactic information is better represented at lower layers while semantic information is captured a higher layers, consistent with MT encoders. It also shows that our biLM consistently provides richer representations then CoVe. Additionally, we analyze the sensitivity to where ELMo is included in the task model (Sec. 5.2), training set size (Sec. 5.4), and visualize the ELMo learned weights across the tasks (Sec. 5.5).
items.zh: 本节提供消融分析以验证我们的主要主张，并阐明ELMo表示的一些有趣方面。第5.1节表明，在下游任务中使用深度上下文表示比之前仅使用顶层的工作（无论来自biLM还是MT编码器）性能更好，并且ELMo表示提供了最佳整体性能。第5.3节探讨了biLM中捕获的不同类型的上下文信息，并使用两种内在评估表明，句法信息在较低层表示得更好，而语义信息在较高层捕获，这与MT编码器一致。它还表明，我们的biLM始终提供比CoVe更丰富的表示。此外，我们分析了ELMo在任务模型中的位置（第5.2节）、训练集大小（第5.4节）的敏感性，并可视化了各任务中ELMo学习到的权重（第5.5节）。

items.en: There are many alternatives to Equation 1 for combining the biLM layers. Previous work on contextual representations used only the last layer, whether it be from a biLM (Peters et al., 2017) or an MT encoder (CoVe; McCann et al., 2017). The choice of the regularization parameter λ𝜆\lambda is also important, as large values such as λ=1𝜆1\lambda=1 effectively reduce the weighting function to a simple average over the layers, while smaller values (e.g., λ=0.001𝜆0.001\lambda=0.001) allow the layer weights to vary.
items.zh: 对于组合biLM层，公式1有许多替代方案。先前关于上下文表示的工作仅使用最后一层，无论是来自biLM（Peters等人，2017）还是MT编码器（CoVe；McCann等人，2017）。正则化参数λ的选择也很重要，因为较大的值（如λ=1）实际上将加权函数简化为各层的简单平均，而较小的值（例如λ=0.001）允许层权重变化。

items.en: The overall trend is similar with CoVe but with smaller increases over the baseline. For SNLI, averaging all layers with λ𝜆\lambda=1 improves development accuracy from 88.2 to 88.7% over using just the last layer. SRL F1 increased a marginal 0.1% to 82.2 for the λ𝜆\lambda=1 case compared to using the last layer only.
items.zh: CoVe的整体趋势相似，但相对于基线的提升较小。对于SNLI，使用λ=1对所有层进行平均，开发准确率从仅使用最后一层的88.2%提高到88.7%。对于SRL，与仅使用最后一层相比，λ=1情况下的F1略微提高了0.1%，达到82.2。

items.en: All of the task architectures in this paper include word embeddings only as input to the lowest layer biRNN. However, we find that including ELMo at the output of the biRNN in task-specific architectures improves overall results for some tasks. As shown in Table 3, including ELMo at both the input and output layers for SNLI and SQuAD improves over just the input layer, but for SRL (and coreference resolution, not shown) performance is highest when it is included at just the input layer. One possible explanation for this result is that both the SNLI and SQuAD architectures use attention layers after the biRNN, so introducing ELMo at this layer allows the model to attend directly to the biLM’s internal representations. In the SRL case, the task-specific context representations are likely more important than those from the biLM.
items.zh: 本文中的所有任务架构仅在最低层biRNN的输入中包含词嵌入。然而，我们发现，在任务特定架构的biRNN输出端包含ELMo可以改善某些任务的整体结果。如表3所示，对于SNLI和SQuAD，在输入和输出层都包含ELMo比仅在输入层更好，但对于SRL（以及共指消解，未显示），仅在输入层包含时性能最高。对此结果的一种可能解释是，SNLI和SQuAD架构在biRNN之后都使用了注意力层，因此在此层引入ELMo允许模型直接关注biLM的内部表示。在SRL情况下，任务特定的上下文表示可能比biLM的表示更重要。

full.sec: 5.3 What information is captured by the biLM’s representations?
full.secZh: 5.3 双向语言模型表示捕获了哪些信息？

items.en: Since adding ELMo improves task performance over word vectors alone, the biLM’s contextual representations must encode information generally useful for NLP tasks that is not captured in word vectors. Intuitively, the biLM must be disambiguating the meaning of words using their context. Consider “play”, a highly polysemous word. The top of Table 4 lists nearest neighbors to “play” using GloVe vectors. They are spread across several parts of speech (e.g., “played”, “playing” as verbs, and “player”, “game” as nouns) but concentrated in the sports-related senses of “play”. In contrast, the bottom two rows show nearest neighbor sentences from the SemCor dataset (see below) using the biLM’s context representation of “play” in the source sentence. In these cases, the biLM is able to disambiguate both the part of speech and word sense in the source sentence.
items.zh: 由于添加ELMo比单独使用词向量提高了任务性能，biLM的上下文表示必须编码了词向量未捕获的、对NLP任务通常有用的信息。直观上，biLM必须利用上下文来消解词义。考虑高度多义词“play”。表4顶部列出了使用GloVe向量的“play”的最近邻。它们分布在多个词性中（例如，作为动词的“played”、“playing”，以及作为名词的“player”、“game”），但集中在“play”的体育相关义项上。相比之下，底部两行显示了使用源句子中“play”的biLM上下文表示从SemCor数据集（见下文）中得到的最近邻句子。在这些情况下，biLM能够消解源句子中的词性和词义。

items.en: These observations can be quantified using an intrinsic evaluation of the contextual representations similar to Belinkov et al. (2017). To isolate the information encoded by the biLM, the representations are used to directly make predictions for a fine grained word sense disambiguation (WSD) task and a POS tagging task. Using this approach, it is also possible to compare to CoVe, and across each of the individual layers.
items.zh: 这些观察可以通过对上下文表示进行内在评估来量化，类似于 Belinkov 等人（2017）的方法。为了隔离 biLM 编码的信息，这些表示被直接用于细粒度词义消歧（WSD）任务和词性标注（POS）任务的预测。使用这种方法，还可以与 CoVe 以及各个单独层进行比较。

items.en: Word sense disambiguation Given a sentence, we can use the biLM representations to predict the sense of a target word using a simple 1-nearest neighbor approach, similar to Melamud et al. (2016). To do so, we first use the biLM to compute representations for all words in SemCor 3.0, our training corpus (Miller et al., 1994), and then take the average representation for each sense. At test time, we again use the biLM to compute representations for a given target word and take the nearest neighbor sense from the training set, falling back to the first sense from WordNet for lemmas not observed during training.
items.zh: 词义消歧 给定一个句子，我们可以使用 biLM 表示通过简单的 1-最近邻方法预测目标词的词义，类似于 Melamud 等人（2016）。为此，我们首先使用 biLM 计算训练语料库 SemCor 3.0（Miller 等人，1994）中所有词的表示，然后取每个词义的平均表示。在测试时，我们再次使用 biLM 计算给定目标词的表示，并从训练集中取最近邻的词义，对于训练中未出现的词形，回退到 WordNet 的第一个词义。

items.en: POS tagging To examine whether the biLM captures basic syntax, we used the context representations as input to a linear classifier that predicts POS tags with the Wall Street Journal portion of the Penn Treebank (PTB) (Marcus et al., 1993). As the linear classifier adds only a small amount of model capacity, this is direct test of the biLM’s representations. Similar to WSD, the biLM representations are competitive with carefully tuned, task specific biLSTMs (Ling et al., 2015; Ma and Hovy, 2016). However, unlike WSD, accuracies using the first biLM layer are higher than the top layer, consistent with results from deep biLSTMs in multi-task training (Søgaard and Goldberg, 2016; Hashimoto et al., 2017) and MT (Belinkov et al., 2017). CoVe POS tagging accuracies follow the same pattern as those from the biLM, and just like for WSD, the biLM achieves higher accuracies than the CoVe encoder.
items.zh: 词性标注 为了检查 biLM 是否捕获了基本句法，我们使用上下文表示作为线性分类器的输入，该分类器使用 Penn Treebank（PTB）的华尔街日报部分（Marcus 等人，1993）预测词性标签。由于线性分类器只增加了少量模型容量，这是对 biLM 表示的直接测试。与 WSD 类似，biLM 表示与精心调整的、任务特定的 biLSTM（Ling 等人，2015；Ma 和 Hovy，2016）具有竞争力。然而，与 WSD 不同，使用第一层 biLM 的准确率高于顶层，这与深度 biLSTM 在多任务训练（Søgaard 和 Goldberg，2016；Hashimoto 等人，2017）和机器翻译（Belinkov 等人，2017）中的结果一致。CoVe 的词性标注准确率遵循与 biLM 相同的模式，并且与 WSD 一样，biLM 的准确率高于 CoVe 编码器。

items.en: Implications for supervised tasks Taken together, these experiments confirm different layers in the biLM represent different types of information and explain why including all biLM layers is important for the highest performance in downstream tasks. In addition, the biLM’s representations are more transferable to WSD and POS tagging than those in CoVe, helping to illustrate why ELMo outperforms CoVe in downstream tasks.
items.zh: 对监督任务的启示 综合来看，这些实验证实了 biLM 的不同层表示不同类型的信息，并解释了为什么包含所有 biLM 层对于下游任务获得最高性能很重要。此外，biLM 的表示比 CoVe 的表示更易于迁移到 WSD 和词性标注任务，这有助于说明为什么 ELMo 在下游任务中优于 CoVe。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Comparison of baseline vs. ELMo performance for SNLI and SRL as the training set size is varied from 0.1% to 100%.
items.capZh: 图 1：当训练集大小从 0.1% 变化到 100% 时，SNLI 和 SRL 的基线模型与 ELMo 模型的性能比较。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Visualization of softmax normalized biLM layer weights across tasks and ELMo locations. Normalized weights less then 1/3131/3 are hatched with horizontal lines and those greater then 2/3232/3 are speckled.
items.capZh: 图 2：跨任务和 ELMo 位置的 softmax 归一化 biLM 层权重的可视化。归一化权重小于 1/3 的用水平线填充，大于 2/3 的用点状填充。

items.en: Adding ELMo to a model increases the sample efficiency considerably, both in terms of number of parameter updates to reach state-of-the-art performance and the overall training set size. For example, the SRL model reaches a maximum development F1 after 486 epochs of training without ELMo. After adding ELMo, the model exceeds the baseline maximum at epoch 10, a 98% relative decrease in the number of updates needed to reach the same level of performance.
items.zh: 将 ELMo 添加到模型中会显著提高样本效率，无论是在达到最先进性能所需的参数更新次数方面，还是在总体训练集大小方面。例如，SRL 模型在没有 ELMo 的情况下经过 486 个训练周期达到最大开发 F1。添加 ELMo 后，模型在第 10 个周期就超过了基线最大值，达到相同性能水平所需的更新次数相对减少了 98%。

items.en: In addition, ELMo-enhanced models use smaller training sets more efficiently than models without ELMo. Figure 1 compares the performance of baselines models with and without ELMo as the percentage of the full training set is varied from 0.1% to 100%. Improvements with ELMo are largest for smaller training sets and significantly reduce the amount of training data needed to reach a given level of performance. In the SRL case, the ELMo model with 1% of the training set has about the same F1 as the baseline model with 10% of the training set.
items.zh: 此外，ELMo 增强的模型比没有 ELMo 的模型更有效地利用较小的训练集。图 1 比较了当完整训练集的百分比从 0.1% 变化到 100% 时，有和没有 ELMo 的基线模型的性能。ELMo 的改进在较小的训练集上最大，并显著减少了达到给定性能水平所需的训练数据量。在 SRL 情况下，使用 1% 训练集的 ELMo 模型的 F1 与使用 10% 训练集的基线模型大致相同。

items.en: We have introduced a general approach for learning high-quality deep context-dependent representations from biLMs, and shown large improvements when applying ELMo to a broad range of NLP tasks. Through ablations and other controlled experiments, we have also confirmed that the biLM layers efficiently encode different types of syntactic and semantic information about words-in-context, and that using all layers improves overall task performance.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种从 biLM 学习高质量深度上下文相关表示的通用方法，并在将 ELMo 应用于广泛的 NLP 任务时展示了巨大的改进。通过消融和其他控制实验，我们还证实了 biLM 层有效地编码了关于上下文词汇的不同类型的句法和语义信息，并且使用所有层可以提高整体任务性能。
